verdict.text: Cuiabá scores Caution. The Mato Grosso capital and primary gateway to the Pantanal and Chapada dos Guimarães has moderate crime — elevated beyond the national framework but manageable for transit visitors.

reconciliation.text: Robbery and carjacking are the main risks; some outer bairros have gang activity. The extreme heat and limited tourist infrastructure mean visitors often spend minimal time in the city itself, which reduces risk exposure.

If transiting through Cuiabá for Pantanal tours, stay near the Goiabeiras or Duque de Caxias areas. Use a reputable tour operator who handles all logistics. Minimize time in the city centre; Chapada dos Guimarães (separate from Cuiabá) has a safer risk profile.
